proposal1.heroHeadline: 30acres is losing $50,000 yearly on manual proposal generation. Here's how.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals drains resources. Generate them in 47 seconds with automation tailored to your services.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are ongoing financial leaks, not mere inefficiencies.

problems.title: Lost Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. For 30acres, that's hundreds of hours annually.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Slow proposal responses mean lost deals. Each delay costs 30acres potential new clients.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually creating proposals risks brand misalignment. Inconsistent messaging can cost 30acres client trust.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff to manually create proposals inflates costs. Each proposal costs more in labor than necessary.

problems.title: Inaccurate Proposals
problems.description: Manual errors in proposals can lead to rejection. Correcting mistakes wastes additional resources.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Prolonged manual work leads to employee burnout. Staff turnover costs 30acres in recruitment and training.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Here's how our AI system replaces all these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. With our system, they are ready in 47 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes risk brand inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns with 30acres's brand.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective Labor
solutions.description: High labor costs for manual work. Our system reduces labor needs, cutting expenses significantly.

solutions.title: Accurate Proposals
solutions.description: Manual errors are costly. Our AI generates precise, error-free proposals every time.

solutions.title: Team Satisfaction
solutions.description: Manual work contributes to burnout. Automation frees your team to focus on strategic tasks.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for 30acres's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for 30acres around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for 30acres.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Acme Corp's Potential with 30acres's Proven Strategies.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will transform your online presence with a targeted strategy that enhances engagement and drives conversions.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is facing significant revenue losses due to current website inefficiencies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. With a conversion rate of just 2%, you are missing out on potential growth.

problems.title: Poor User Experience
problems.description: A clunky interface leads to user frustration, costing you repeat business. Studies show that 88% of users are unlikely to return after a bad experience.

problems.title: Ineffective SEO
problems.description: With inadequate SEO, your site is virtually invisible. This invisibility results in a 40% loss in organic traffic every month.

problems.title: Weak Brand Messaging
problems.description: Inconsistent messaging confuses potential clients, leading to an estimated 25% drop in brand trust and customer retention.

problems.title: Inadequate Social Media Engagement
problems.description: Low engagement rates on social media mean missed opportunities for customer interaction, resulting in a 30% loss in potential leads.

problems.title: Outdated Content Strategy
problems.description: Without fresh content, your site struggles to rank, losing approximately 35% of potential leads to competitors with more up-to-date material.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these losses, transforming challenges into opportunities.

solutions.title: Website Optimization Service
solutions.description: We enhance your site's performance, maximizing conversion rates and user satisfaction.

solutions.title: SEO Enhancement
solutions.description: Our SEO strategies increase your visibility, driving more organic traffic to your site.

solutions.title: Content Strategy Development
solutions.description: We craft compelling content that resonates with your audience, elevating brand trust.

solutions.title: Social Media Engagement
solutions.description: Our approach boosts your social media presence, enhancing customer interaction.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: 30acres stands out with its proven track record and expert team.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Success
whyUsCards.description: With a history of transforming businesses, we deliver results that speak volumes.

whyUsCards.title: Expert Team
whyUsCards.description: Our team consists of industry veterans who know how to drive growth and engagement.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven
whyUsCards.description: We base our strategies on hard data, ensuring effective and measurable outcomes.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric
whyUsCards.description: Your goals are our priority. We tailor our services to meet your specific needs.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet our dedicated team of professionals.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with a focus on delivering impactful results. Committed to fostering long-term partnerships.
